hero.bio: Building scalable applications with NestJS, GraphQL, and the MERN stack, deploying cloud-native systems, and integrating LLMs like Gemini and OpenAI into real products with context-grounded prompting.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: Comprehensive expertise across the modern development stack, with focus on scalable web applications, DevOps practices, and AI integration.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: Building full-stack, DevOps, and AI-integrated solutions across teams in Uzbekistan and Türkiye.

jobs.title: FullStack and DevOps Engineer
bullets: Developed scalable web applications and AI solutions using TypeScript, Node.js, Python and modern frameworks like NestJS, Express, and FastAPI. Built REST/GraphQL APIs, data crawling/batching systems and RDBS/NoSQL as MongoDB, MySQL, Prisma, Redis.
Managed deployment and infrastructure using Docker, Nginx, PM2, Shell and Linux. Also built AI and ML/DL solutions using PyTorch, OpenCV, and integrated modern AI APIs Codex, Claude, Gemini.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Architected and developed MERN applications with React and TypeScript, building robust server-side apps in Node.js/Express.js and implementing authentication with JWT, express-session, and BcryptJS.

Configured DNS and firewalls on Linux, deployed with Docker and Nginx, integrated Grafana for monitoring, and managed infrastructure using PM2, XShell, FileZilla, GitHub, and package managers (Yarn, nvm, npm).

jobs.title: Backend and Frontend Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained fullstack web applications with Node.js, Python, React, and Next.js — building RESTful APIs, integrating MongoDB/MySQL, and creating responsive UIs with HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.
Collaborated with the team to deliver features, fix bugs, and improve performance, while managing a monorepo with npm/Yarn/nvm and GitHub for version control.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects that demonstrate my expertise in full-stack development, DevOps practices, and AI integration.

items.title: MediBridge
items.description: Korea medical tourism marketplace built on a microservice architecture — NestJS API Gateway, a GraphQL/MongoDB core service, Stripe-powered escrow payments (PostgreSQL/Prisma), real-time multilingual chat, and a Python/FastAPI AI service for translation and clinic recommendations, connected via RabbitMQ.

items.title: NearHelp
items.description: Home services marketplace (plumbing, electrical, repair) with AI-powered service recommendations, price estimation, and semantic search. Multilingual (EN/KR/UZ) with real-time chat via Socket.IO.

items.title: QuickStay
items.description: Hotel booking platform with dual guest/owner roles. Server-side date-overlap checks prevent double booking, Stripe + signed webhooks confirm payments, and Clerk auth syncs in real time with MongoDB.

items.title: AI Habit Tracker
items.description: Habit tracker integrated with Google Gemini. Every AI response is grounded in the user's actual 7/30/90-day habit history using a lightweight RAG pattern, with drag-and-drop and streak tracking.

items.title: Caffiora
items.description: Cafe ordering platform built on an MVC architecture, with an EJS-based admin panel and JWT/session authentication.

items.title: AI Chatbot (Telegram Reminder Bot)
items.description: Telegram bot that understands plans in natural language and sends reminders, powered by the OpenAI API with scheduled task execution.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Ready to bring your next project to life? Let's discuss how my expertise in full-stack development and DevOps can help achieve your goals.
contact.locationValue: Seoul, South Korea · Open to Remote Work
contact.subject: Subject
contact.alertText: Thanks for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.

footer.role: Full-Stack Developer | DevOps Engineer | AI Engineer
